meta.name: Carbon Tracker Design System
meta.description: Warm, green-and-earth-toned dashboard design system. Minimalist, data-dense, low-noise aesthetic with organic feel. Suitable for analytics, sustainability, agriculture, health, and fintech dashboards.
meta.design_tone: Calm, botanical, understated. Avoids harsh contrast. Uses muted natural tones with bold green accents for data emphasis. Feels like a well-designed sustainability journal.

bg.role: Page background — warm off-white paper tone

green-lt.role: Light green background for highlighted cards

transition.role: Default transition for all interactive elements

body_small.use: Table cells, alert text, badge text

tiny.use: Trend labels, notification badges, rec tags (uppercase)

mono_small.use: Bar values, trend labels, summary month values

fadeIn.css: @keyframes fadeIn { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(8px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } }

fadeInUp.css: @keyframes fadeInUp { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(16px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } }

scaleIn.css: @keyframes scaleIn { from { opacity: 0; transform: scale(.95); } to { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); } }

slideIn.css: @keyframes slideIn { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateX(-12px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateX(0); } }

slideUp.css: @keyframes slideUp { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(20px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } }

classes.animate-row: fadeIn 0.3s ease both (for staggered list rows via animation-delay: index*0.02s)

base.css: display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:8px; padding:10px 20px; border:none; border-radius:var(--radius-sm); font-family:inherit; font-size:14px; font-weight:500; cursor:pointer; transition:all var(--transition); text-decoration:none; line-height:1;

label.css: display:block; font-size:11px; font-weight:500; color:var(--muted); margin-bottom:6px; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.05em;

input_select_textarea.css: width:100%; padding:10px 14px; border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:var(--radius-sm); font-family:inherit; font-size:14px; color:var(--text); background:var(--bg); outline:none; transition:all var(--transition);

forms.select_arrow_hint: Native browser select — no custom arrow override

error_msg.css: color:var(--red); font-size:13px; margin-top:10px; display:none; animation:fadeIn .3s ease;

success_msg.css: color:var(--green); font-size:13px; margin-top:10px; display:none; animation:fadeIn .3s ease;

card.css: background:var(--surface); border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:var(--radius); padding:20px; transition:all var(--transition);

panel.css: background:var(--surface); border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:var(--radius); padding:24px; margin-bottom:20px; transition:all var(--transition);

panel_title.css: font-size:14px; font-weight:500; margin-bottom:16px; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px;

container.css: width:220px; min-height:100vh; background:var(--surface); border-right:1px solid var(--border); padding:24px 12px; display:flex; flex-direction:column; flex-shrink:0; position:sticky; top:0; height:100vh; z-index:100;

logo.css: font-family:var(--font-mono); font-size:15px; font-weight:500; color:var(--green); margin-bottom:28px; padding-left:8px;

nav_item.css: display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px; padding:10px 12px; border-radius:var(--radius-sm); cursor:pointer; font-size:14px; color:var(--muted); margin-bottom:2px; transition:all var(--transition); text-decoration:none;

mobile.toggle_button: Fixed position, top-left, 40x40px, hidden on desktop, shows on <=900px
mobile.backdrop: Fixed full-screen rgba(0,0,0,.3), z-index:99, for closing sidebar
mobile.behavior: Sidebar slides off-screen (left:-260px), toggled via .open class

thead.th: text-align:left; padding:10px 12px; font-size:11px; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.05em; color:var(--muted); border-bottom:1px solid var(--border); font-weight:500; white-space:nowrap;

base.css: display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:4px; padding:3px 10px; border-radius:20px; font-size:11px; font-weight:500; white-space:nowrap;

row.css: display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px; font-size:13px; animation:fadeIn .4s ease both;

label.css: width:110px; color:var(--muted); font-size:12px; white-space:nowrap; overflow:hidden; text-overflow:ellipsis; flex-shrink:0;

value.css: width:70px; text-align:right; font-family:var(--font-mono); font-size:12px; color:var(--muted); flex-shrink:0;

bar.css: width:100%; border-radius:4px 4px 0 0; background:var(--green); min-height:4px; transition:height .6s cubic-bezier(.25,.46,.45,.94);

progress_bar.color_logic: width >= 80% color:var(--red) | width >= 60% color:var(--amber) | else color:var(--green)

backdrop.css: display:none; position:fixed; inset:0; background:rgba(0,0,0,.4); backdrop-filter:blur(4px); z-index:500; align-items:center; justify-content:center; padding:20px;

modal.css: background:var(--surface); border-radius:var(--radius-lg); padding:28px; width:100%; max-width:480px; animation:scaleIn .3s ease; max-height:80vh; overflow-y:auto;

backdrop.css: display:none; position:fixed; inset:0; background:rgba(0,0,0,.4); backdrop-filter:blur(4px); z-index:600; align-items:center; justify-content:center; padding:20px;

container.css: position:fixed; top:20px; right:20px; z-index:999; display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:8px; pointer-events:none;

toast.css: pointer-events:auto; padding:12px 20px; border-radius:var(--radius-sm); font-size:13px; font-weight:500; box-shadow:var(--shadow-lg); animation:slideIn .3s ease, fadeIn .3s ease; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px; max-width:360px;

skeleton.css: background:linear-gradient(90deg, var(--bg) 25%, #e8e6e0 50%, var(--bg) 75%); background-size:200px 100%; animation:shimmer 1.5s infinite; border-radius:var(--radius-sm);

spinner.css: width:20px; height:20px; border:2px solid var(--border); border-top-color:var(--green); border-radius:50%; animation:spin .6s linear infinite; display:inline-block;

loading_overlay.css: display:none; position:fixed; inset:0; background:rgba(245,244,240,.8); backdrop-filter:blur(4px); z-index:1000; align-items:center; justify-content:center;

loading.loading_dots: 3 dots, 8px each, pulse animation staggered at 0s/.2s/.4s

card.css: padding:18px; border-radius:var(--radius-sm); border:1px solid var(--border); margin-bottom:12px; transition:all var(--transition); animation:fadeIn .4s ease both;

focus_badge.css: display:inline-block; font-size:10px; font-weight:600; background:var(--green); color:#fff; padding:2px 8px; border-radius:20px; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.03em;

item.css: display:flex; align-items:flex-start; gap:12px; padding:14px 0; border-bottom:1px solid var(--border); animation:slideIn .3s ease both;

dot.css: width:8px; height:8px; border-radius:50%; background:var(--red); margin-top:6px; flex-shrink:0;

month.css: padding:16px; border-radius:var(--radius-sm); border:1px solid var(--border); text-align:center; transition:all var(--transition);

icon.css: width:32px; height:32px; border-radius:50%; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; font-size:14px;

container.css: display:flex; gap:4px; background:var(--bg); padding:4px; border-radius:var(--radius-sm); margin-bottom:20px; display:inline-flex;

button.css: padding:6px 16px; border:none; background:transparent; border-radius:6px; font-family:inherit; font-size:13px; cursor:pointer; color:var(--muted); transition:all var(--transition);

bar.css: display:flex; gap:0; margin-bottom:20px; border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);

item.css: padding:10px 18px; border:none; background:transparent; font-family:inherit; font-size:13px; cursor:pointer; color:var(--muted); border-bottom:2px solid transparent; transition:all var(--transition); margin-bottom:-1px;

card.css: background:var(--surface); border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:var(--radius-lg); padding:40px; width:100%; max-width:400px; animation:scaleIn .4s ease;

notification_badge.css: background:var(--red); color:#fff; font-size:10px; font-weight:700; border-radius:10px; padding:1px 6px; margin-left:auto; min-width:18px; text-align:center;

admin_badge.css: background:var(--amber-lt); color:var(--amber); font-size:11px; padding:2px 8px; border-radius:20px; font-weight:500;

icons_svg_assets.type: Unicode/emoji icons — no custom SVG, lightweight approach

app_shell.structure: Sidebar (220px fixed) + Main content area (flex:1, max-width:1200px)

page_transitions.entry: Wrap content in div.animate-fade-up for page-entry animation

responsive_breakpoints.900px: two-col -> 1 column; three-col -> 2 columns; sidebar collapses to off-screen hamburger; main padding: 60px 20px 20px; stats-grid min 150px
responsive_breakpoints.600px: three-col -> 1 column; log-grid -> 1 column; stats-grid -> 2 columns; auth-card padding: 24px; modal padding: 20px

toast.lifecycle: Appends to #toastContainer, auto-removes after 3500ms with fade-out

loading.hide: hideLoading() — decrements counter, removes .active when count reaches 0

auth_page.structure: toast-container + auth-wrap > auth-card.animate-scale > h1 + p + auth-tabs + form > form-group*(fields) + btn-primary[width:100%]

content_patterns: panel > table-wrap > table for data lists

modal_pattern.js: Open: add 'active' class to both. Close: remove 'active' from both.

interaction_patterns.data_refresh_flow: CRUD via api() -> showLoading()/hideLoading() -> toast() -> setTimeout(location.reload, 1000)

data_thresholds.report_status: Reviewed: badge-green | Submitted: badge-amber | Pending: badge-gray
